monetary_account_paying_id.description: ID of the monetary account of which you want to pay from.

request_id.description: ID of the request for which you want to whitelist the originating SDD.

maximum_amount_per_month.description: The maximum amount of money that is allowed to be deducted per month based on the whitelist.

maximum_amount_per_payment.description: The maximum amount of money that is allowed to be deducted per payment based on the whitelist.
